key_components: collect_watch_dirs (discovers state dirs and team-* subdirs)
patterns: RAII cleanup with Drop impl + panic hook chaining
std::thread for blocking operations (crossterm, fs watcher)
std::sync::mpsc internal bridge, exposed as tokio::sync::mpsc::UnboundedReceiver

changes: Extracted column building logic from App::new into public build_columns(cards_root)
Refactored App::new to use build_columns helper
file_insights.rationale: Code reuse: fs watcher needs same column rebuild logic without duplicating card discovery

changes: Replaced stub run_ui with full implementation
Added EventLoop spawning and main event loop with tokio::select!-style pattern
Implemented quit handling (q key or Ctrl-C)
file_insights.completeness: Event routing to handlers mostly stubbed; input.rs will wire remaining handlers

patterns_discovered.name: RAII terminal lifecycle
patterns_discovered.description: TerminalGuard enters alternate screen/raw mode on new(), restores on Drop. Panic hook installed for safety net cleanup before abort.
patterns_discovered.benefit: Terminal state never left broken even on panic or unwind

patterns_discovered.name: Three-source unified event model
patterns_discovered.description: Crossterm (std::thread + blocking poll), timer (tokio async), fs watcher (std::thread + std::sync::mpsc) all feed into single tokio::sync::mpsc::UnboundedReceiver<AppEvent>
patterns_discovered.benefit: Main loop uses single async recv() call; no complex select! or polling required

patterns_discovered.name: Sync-to-async bridge pattern
patterns_discovered.description: std::sync::mpsc channel receiver inside std::thread spawned by spawn_fs_watcher, forwards to tokio channel via clone of UnboundedSender
patterns_discovered.benefit: Blocking fs watcher doesn't block async main loop; clean separation

patterns_discovered.name: Debouncer with timeout
patterns_discovered.description: notify_debouncer_mini with 200ms timeout prevents event flooding on rapid filesystem changes
patterns_discovered.benefit: Avoids card refresh storms; single coalesced Cards event per activity burst

patterns_discovered.name: Extracted builder for state refresh
patterns_discovered.description: build_columns() extracted from App::new so fs watcher can rebuild columns on change
patterns_discovered.benefit: DRY principle; fs events trigger live column refresh without duplicating collection logic

gotchas_discovered.solution: Spawned on dedicated std::thread with 50ms timeout poll; thread exits when channel receiver drops
gotchas_discovered.impact: Cannot run blocking crossterm::event::poll in tokio context; thread spawn is correct
gotchas_discovered.memory_ref: bop project uses Tokio runtime; blocking ops must move to std::thread

gotchas_discovered.solution: std::sync::mpsc inside spawn_fs_watcher std::thread, cloned UnboundedSender bridges to tokio channel
gotchas_discovered.impact: Two std::threads (crossterm + watcher) + one tokio runtime = no deadlock risk
gotchas_discovered.gotcha_detail: notify receiver iteration blocks; must be in std::thread, not tokio::spawn

gotchas_discovered.issue: New team-* directories created after startup won't be watched
gotchas_discovered.solution: Root directory watched non-recursively to detect new team-* creation; per-team state dirs still watched recursively
gotchas_discovered.impact: If team-foo created mid-session, its state dirs are not auto-discovered until next full rebuild
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Consider re-scanning watch_dirs on AppEvent::Cards to dynamically add new team dirs

gotchas_discovered.solution: std::panic::take_hook() captures original before set_hook; closure moves original_hook into panic handler
gotchas_discovered.impact: Correct chaining; nested panic handlers won't lose previous behavior
gotchas_discovered.gotcha_detail: Forgetting to capture original_hook would silence previous panic handlers

gotchas_discovered.solution: Works for typical UI frame rates (~16-20ms per frame at 60fps), but timeout is fixed
gotchas_discovered.impact: If terminal events are sent right before timeout expires, up to 50ms latency before processing
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Consider making timeout configurable based on target frame rate

approach_outcome.summary: Fully implemented event loop infrastructure with three concurrent event sources unified into a single async channel. Terminal state lifecycle properly managed via RAII TerminalGuard with panic safety net.
approach_outcome.completeness: Event routing handlers (2-2 input.rs, 3-1 clock, 6-4 resize) stubbed but event dispatch architecture complete and ready for integration.
approach_outcome.commit_quality: Single focused commit (c21246b) implementing all subtask requirements

recommendations.suggestion: Add event timestamp to AppEvent variants (Instant::now()) for sparkline and clock rendering.
recommendations.rationale: Subtask 3-1 (clock + sparklines) will need precise tick timing; bake it into event payload now

recommendations.suggestion: Extract magic numbers to module-level constants: TICK_INTERVAL_MS (250), DEBOUNCE_DELAY_MS (200), CROSSTERM_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS (50)
recommendations.rationale: Improves maintainability; makes tuning behavior easier if frame rate or responsiveness needs adjustment

recommendations.suggestion: Log fs watcher failures per state dir, but don't fail startup; allow partial watch coverage gracefully
recommendations.rationale: If a state dir is unmounted or permissions changed, TUI should remain responsive for other state dirs

recommendations.suggestion: Consider re-scanning collect_watch_dirs inside fs watcher loop to detect new team-* dirs created mid-session
recommendations.rationale: Current design won't auto-watch newly created teams; re-scan on every fs event is safe but expensive; could scan every 5s or on explicit signal

recommendations.suggestion: Add integration test spawning mock cards and simulating fs changes to verify Cards events fire with correct columns
recommendations.rationale: Event loop is core IO loop; test watcher responsiveness and column sync on card moves
